div.h3: Critical Path: free_list_head == NULL OR allocated == capacity

g.title: Pool Entry Point: Memory mapping established, free list initialized.
**Invariant:** - `free_list_head == NULL` - `allocated == capacity` - Next allocation attempt triggers safety fault.

text.tspan: // GUARD: Check exhaustion before pointer math
